title: Local Dry-Run Readiness Checkpoint
objective: Add a local-only readiness checkpoint to the Project Miner PM intake dry-run panel so Jason can see whether the mock approval envelope has usable source, review, draft, readback, and authority context before any future live gate.
scope: Add ready/needs-review/blocked classification for candidate source context, source and warning review, local decision draft, admission no-go review, approval status readback, and live-write authority.
Render the checkpoint inside the existing Local Approval Submission Dry Run panel.
Keep the checkpoint local-only and informational.
Extend the focused Playwright smoke to prove the checkpoint and zero mutation requests.
Accept the revised NETA source-map recommendation and author the next Desktop Codex comparative-audit prompt while keeping TCC parked.
not_allowed: No Supabase, Render, Vercel, or Olares action.
No secret access or secret rotation.
No backend route or mutation route change.
No project import, workpackage rows, task rows, apparatus rows, assignment, schedule, status, durable field record, production tracking, workbook macro, or workbook writeback.
No service, auth, DNS, ingress, or control-plane widening.

live_write_gate.required_phrase: I explicitly admit PM Lane 142 live approval POST and first approval-row creation for the current Project Miner Temp Power import candidate.
live_write_gate.note: This phrase was not present for PM Lane 144, so the lane remains local dry-run readiness only.

validation_steps: rg -n "PM Lane 144|Dry-Run Readiness|dry-run readiness|NETA Topic Spine|TCC remains parked|mutationRequests\)\.toHaveLength\(0\)" PROJECT_STATUS.md docs/operations ops/agents apps/operations-web
validation_result: PASS: operations-web typecheck passed, operations-web production build passed, focused PM import-intake Playwright smoke passed with 1 passed, packet JSON parsed, guardrail search confirmed PM Lane 144 plus NETA Topic Spine/TCC parked language, stale Level II pilot language was removed from active status and queue surfaces, and git diff --check passed.
sidecar_result: Revised Desktop Codex NETA source-map closeout recommends a read-only Topic Spine Comparative Audit before authoring. VS Code Codex accepts that amendment and authored a guarded Desktop Codex prompt while keeping TCC parked.
next_recommended_lane: PM lane may continue local operator-review ergonomics or await explicit PM Lane 142 live-write admission; Desktop Codex may receive the NETA Topic Spine Comparative Audit prompt if Jason admits that side lane.
